hero.title: Golden Home Inmobiliaria
hero.subtitle: Your ideal home, just a click away. Property sales and real estate advisory with personalized service in Lloret de Mar and the Costa Brava.

search.title: Find your ideal property

home.featuredSubtitle: A curated selection of the most exceptional residences on the Costa Brava

expertise.title: Luxury market expertise
expertise.description: Over a decade specialising in premium properties in Lloret de Mar and the Costa Brava, with deep knowledge of both local and international markets.

portfolio.title: Exclusive portfolio
portfolio.description: Access to seafront villas, designer penthouses and unique estates you won't find on any other property portal.

service.title: Bespoke service
service.description: Comprehensive, discreet support at every stage — from the first viewing to completion — with multilingual assistance throughout.

location.title: Local knowledge
location.description: Experts in the finest areas of Lloret de Mar — Fenals, Cala Canyelles, Santa Cristina and beyond — to find your perfect location.

home.lifestyleText: Lloret de Mar offers a unique balance of coastal sophistication and Catalan authenticity. Dream beaches, world-class golf courses, fine dining and the tranquillity of the Costa Brava await just minutes from your new home.
home.ctaSubtitle: Our team of advisors is at your disposal to deliver a real estate experience that exceeds your expectations.

about.title: About Golden Home
about.subtitle: Leaders in luxury real estate in Lloret de Mar since 2010
about.mission: Our mission is to connect discerning buyers with exceptional properties on the Costa Brava, delivering the highest standards of service, transparency and personal dedication in every transaction.
about.vision: To be the reference luxury real estate agency on the Costa Brava, recognised for our excellence, integrity and ability to anticipate the needs of an increasingly sophisticated international market.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Every property in our portfolio meets the highest standards of quality, location and design. We never compromise on excellence in anything we do.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: Absolute transparency in every transaction. Our clients trust us because we always act with honesty, ethics and professionalism.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Cutting-edge technology, 360° virtual tours, international digital marketing and analytical tools to deliver the best possible experience.

dedication.title: Dedication
dedication.description: Every client receives personalised attention and genuine commitment. Your satisfaction and the success of your investment are our top priorities.

timeline.2010: Golden Home founded in Lloret de Mar with the ambition to redefine luxury real estate on the Costa Brava.
timeline.2015: Portfolio expansion across the province of Girona and partnerships established with prestigious architecture and design studios.
timeline.2020: Established as an international reference with clients from over 30 countries, embracing digital innovation with virtual tours and e-signatures.
timeline.2026: Market leadership in Lloret de Mar's premium segment with over 200 high-value transactions and an unparalleled property portfolio.
